scripts.publish:isomorphic-eventsource: cd packages/isomorphic-eventsource && yarn install && npm publish --access=public
scripts.publish:isomorphic-fetch: cd packages/isomorphic-fetch && yarn install && npm publish --access=public
scripts.publish:protocol: cd packages/protocol && yarn install && yarn build && npm publish --access=public
scripts.publish:sdk: cd packages/sdk && yarn install && yarn build && npm publish --access=public --tag=beta
scripts.publish:ui: cd packages/ui && yarn install && yarn build && npm publish --access=public --tag=beta
scripts.publish:ui-react: cd packages/ui-react && yarn install && yarn build && npm publish --access=public --tag=beta
